import asyncio
import pytest
from source import AsyncCounter

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_async_counter_concurrent_increments():
    counter = AsyncCounter()
    num_tasks = 200
    await asyncio.gather(*[counter.increment() for _ in range(num_tasks)])
    assert counter.count == num_tasks, f"Expected count {num_tasks} but got {counter.count}"
